subject: Increase Model 2 (Licence) score for 'both balance sheets' option
body:
In licence arrangements, both parties end up with assets on their
balance sheets - Developer capitalises the IP, Buyer capitalises the
licence. Increased Model 2's score from 5 to 7 and updated description
to clarify this includes licence arrangements like white-labeling.
title: Increase Model 2 (Licence) score for 'both balance sheets' option
